  • Method Details

    • convert

      public static List<? extends org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.DomainResource> convert(List<? extends org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.DomainResource> res, boolean check)

    • convert

      public static List<? extends org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.DomainResource> convert(List<? extends org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.DomainResource> res)

    • convert

      public static org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.DomainResource convert(org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.DomainResource res, boolean check)

    • convert

      public static org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.DomainResource convert(org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.DomainResource res)

    • extractReferenceId

      public static String extractReferenceId(org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Reference reference)
      Determination of the ID of a FHIR reference, i.e. the consequence of the removal of the resource type.

      If the reference object is null the identifier is read.

      Parameters:
      reference - FHIR reference as "Encounter/123"
      Returns:
      The plain id of the reference as "123"

    • convertResourceTypesInObject

      public static List<org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.ResourceType> convertResourceTypesInObject(Collection<String> listResourceTypesPrimitive)
      Converts a given textual FHIR ResourceType into a FHIR Enumeration (e.g. ResourceType.Medication).
      Parameters:
      listResourceTypesPrimitive - List with plain resource type names (e.g. "Medication").
      Returns:
      List with FHIR ResourceType entries.
